description: Microsoft Word 2010 is open with a document containing regional sales team meeting notes. Convert the quarterly revenue figures (Q1: $45,200, Q2: $52,100, Q3: $48,900, Q4: $61,300) into a table with 'Quarter' and 'Revenue' columns, including a header row and four data rows. Apply borders to all cells and bold the header row. Save the changes to the document.
